openStudio.heading: Every industry has a desk here
openStudio.subheading: Students, coders, professionals, and educators — browse live sector snapshots from one shared studio floor. Pick a card. See who's building what.

snapshots.label: EdTech
snapshots.caption: Cohort labs running now
snapshots.insight: Micro-credential stacks in instructional design and LMS engineering are the fastest enrollments this quarter.

snapshots.label: SaaS / Cloud
snapshots.caption: Platform builders online
snapshots.insight: Multi-tenant architecture and usage-based billing workshops draw engineers from every background.

snapshots.label: AI & Machine Learning
snapshots.caption: Model labs at peak
snapshots.insight: RAG pipelines and fine-tuning sprints connect researchers with product teams shipping real features.

snapshots.label: CyberSecurity
snapshots.caption: Threat rooms active
snapshots.insight: Purple-team simulations and zero-trust design reviews are open to beginners and senior analysts alike.

snapshots.label: FinTech
snapshots.caption: Ledger desks open
snapshots.insight: Payments API design and regulatory sandbox walkthroughs bridge banking veterans with new builders.

snapshots.label: HealthTech
snapshots.caption: Clinical data circles
snapshots.insight: FHIR integration and patient-data privacy studios attract clinicians learning to ship digital tools.

snapshots.label: E-Commerce
snapshots.caption: Storefront sprints live
snapshots.insight: Conversion optimization and catalog personalization projects are the top portfolio pieces for retail hires.

snapshots.label: OTT & Gaming
snapshots.caption: Stream ops running
snapshots.insight: Live streaming infra and game netcode study groups share the same latency-obsessed community.

snapshots.label: CleanTech
snapshots.caption: Grid forecast desks
snapshots.insight: Carbon accounting and renewable forecasting notebooks connect energy analysts with software learners.

snapshots.label: Supply Chain
snapshots.caption: Route rooms open
snapshots.insight: Last-mile optimization and warehouse automation cohorts welcome ops managers learning to code.

snapshots.label: GovTech
snapshots.caption: Civic build hours
snapshots.insight: Digital identity and open-data portal projects pair civil servants with volunteer developers worldwide.

snapshots.label: HR Tech
snapshots.caption: People analytics live
snapshots.insight: Workforce planning and fairness-audit workshops draw HR leaders into data literacy paths.
